positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_stable(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define leads(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define includes(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_feud(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg_conjecture.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg_conjecture.tptp
1. is_stable(diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
4. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [input(axiom)]
5. has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
6. ? [X0] : (is_stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & has_feud(imperium,X0)) [input(conjecture)]
7. ~? [X0] : (is_stable(X0) & includes(X0,ivy_nile) & has_feud(imperium,X0)) [negated conjecture 6]
9. ! [X0] : (~is_stable(X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~has_feud(imperium,X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
10. is_stable(diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 1]
12. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [cnf transformation 4]
13. has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 5]
14. ~has_feud(imperium,X0) | ~includes(X0,ivy_nile) | ~is_stable(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
15. ~includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) | ~is_stable(diamond_mine) [resolution 13,14]
16. ~is_stable(diamond_mine) [forward subsumption resolution 15,12]
17. $false [forward subsumption resolution 16,10]
% SZS output end Proof for neg_conjecture.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
